{{CargoRelic
|name=Friday Star
|class_id=20929
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Fortune Law 6: When you have a considerable number of draw tickets or wish coins, you can overlook extremely low probabilities!
|fame=32
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail ATK +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400<br> (Awakened)
}}
